signals.reasoning: BTC is constructive, but the caution regime and stronger alt setups keep it in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH has mild upside support, but the edge is still not strong enough to justify a fresh trade.
SOL has lost its earlier long edge and is not clean enough on either side to justify action.
FOGO remains the cleanest bearish name on this board because both price and mechanics continue to lean negative.
ARB is the best long on the board because mechanics are strongly bullish, funding is supportive for continuation, and trade quality is much better than the thinner small-cap names.
CRV is a modest bearish lean because the board still tilts negative and the tape is not showing convincing repair.
CHILLGUY has improved, but the move is still extended enough that I would not chase it here under caution.
DASH remains a strong reduced-confidence long because mechanics are bullish and funding is still negative enough to support a squeeze-style continuation.
